instructions:
Controls:

Up/2 - Jump
Down/8 - Brake / Look Down
Left/4 - Move Left
Right/6 - Move Right 
Fire/5 - Fire Ping-Pong Ball

When Josh has jumped off a half pike against a wall and he is travelling up the wall, he can jump off by pressing up.

If you are moving down a ramp that has a half pike at the end of it and you jump off the ramp while level with the half pike you will be catapulted high up in the air!

(HINT there is a jump like this at the start of the first level!)

Nasty aliens from Zorgon 6 have contaminated the Earth's atmosphere by releasing DNA-altering substances that have caused all insects to mutate into giants, ready to take over the planet on behalf of their alien masters.

But they hadn't taken into account our friend Josh, a street-wise skater who is not prepared to have his fun ended by a pack of overgrown bugs!
Armed with a bunch of reinforced ping-pong balls, the player takes on the role of Josh in this action-packed adventure, and confronts wave after wave of wasps, beetles and spiders to free the world.

Shoot bugs and collect coins for points!

You get an extra life if you collect 100 coins.

Collect invincibility by picking up the "I" block.

If you kill 5 bugs while invincible you get an extra life!

There are many secret areas hidden around each level for clever skaters!

You are also playing against the clock!

You can just chill and perform stunts or you can race to the end to try and finish the game in the fastest possible time!

Good Luck!
